no_changes_rationale:
Bead ddx-bc346d44 is an epic. Its acceptance criterion is "All child beads closed."

Children:
- ddx-7140a0cf "web-ui: graph elements remain visible in dark mode" — status: open

The epic carries no implementation ACs of its own; the testable work lives in
the child bead. No code changes are appropriate at the epic level. The epic
will close automatically once ddx-7140a0cf is implemented and closed in a
subsequent execute-bead run.

What is done: nothing at the epic level (by design).
What is blocking: ddx-7140a0cf must be implemented and closed first.
What a follow-up attempt would need: dequeue the child bead ddx-7140a0cf
and execute it; once closed, this epic's AC is satisfied and it can be closed.
